title: ITM Campus Retrieve
tagline: Lost & found system for ITM students
problem: Students had no centralized system to report or find lost items. Communication happened through scattered WhatsApp messages and informal channels, making recovery unreliable.
solution: Built a clean web application where students post lost or found items with description, location, and contact info. Designed for fast posting and easy searching without login friction.
result: Solves a real student problem with a usable, structured system. Reduced dependency on scattered messaging and demonstrates practical full-stack problem solving.

title: ITM Notes
problem: Students relied on scattered notes, PDFs, and WhatsApp messages for exam prep, with no single reliable source organized by subject.
solution: Built a structured website with subject-wise notes, important questions, and interactive MCQs covering 5 engineering subjects — organized for fast revision.
result: Actively used by peers as a primary study resource. Improved content accessibility and helped students revise faster with structured, subject-specific material.
